name: Yellow Squash Casserole#2
recipeIngredient: 1 pound yellow squash, cooked, drained and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, onion, 1/4 cup cracker crumbs, egg, sugar, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the cooked, mashed yellow squash to the mixture. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 1-quart casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle the remaining cracker crumbs over the top of the squash mixture.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Serve and enjoy your Yellow Squash Casserole!
